name: Hellterfly’s Dream
descs:
When applying [Combustion] Potency or 'Unique Burn' to an enemy with [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn', randomly inflict a total of 3 [Combustion] Potency between all enemies.

When activating Wrath Absolute Resonance, randomly inflict a total of 5 [Combustion] Potency between all enemies at Combat Start.

When applying [Combustion] Potency or 'Unique Burn' to an enemy with [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn', randomly inflict a total of 4 [Combustion] Potency between all enemies.

When activating Wrath Absolute Resonance, randomly inflict a total of 6 [Combustion] Potency between all enemies at Combat Start.

When applying [Combustion] Potency or 'Unique Burn' to an enemy with [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn', randomly inflict a total of 5 [Combustion] between all enemies.

When activating Wrath Resonance, randomly inflict a total of 8 [Combustion] Potency between all enemies at Combat Start.
